'''Skibs''' were creatures that built dams and moved along the surface of [[Water/Legends|water]] on their elongated [[Limb/Legends|feet]], which resembled natural water-skis. They were found on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].<ref name="PB" />

{{Species-stub}}
